prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins on a completely black screen.

It then cuts into a corporate meeting-room setting. The image appears layered or in transition: a large close-up of a bald man’s face is superimposed over a conference table scene with several seated people. The room has modern lighting, including a large circular ceiling light, and glass walls or reflective surfaces. Behind or overlaid with the meeting room are landscape-like visuals, including mountains or rocky scenery, making the frame look like a montage or cross-fade.

The next sampled moment continues the layered visual style. A man’s face is centered in close-up, with a woman standing behind or overlaid above him. The conference-room table is still partially visible, including small blue nameplate-like objects and other tabletop items. The background again includes dramatic outdoor imagery, with mountains and bright light or fire-like orange areas at the edges. Because the images overlap, it is unclear whether these are projections, reflections, or a transition effect.

The commercial ends on a clear product-and-offer screen. Two iPhone 15 Pro devices are shown prominently on the left in a titanium/silver color. Large text reads “Titanium” and “iPhone 15 Pro.” On the right, bold promotional text says “NEW & CURRENT CUSTOMERS iPHONE 15 PRO ON US,” followed by the “uscellular” logo. Fine-print legal text appears along the bottom. The background is dark and out of focus, with bright overhead lights and blue screens.
